summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected. Security preflight found no security-sensitive job refs. Close, merge, fix, and low-signal PR closeout were not available for this job, so open PRs were either kept open or routed to exact maintainer decisions where proof, maintainer signal, active author follow-up, or technical correctness gates remain unresolved.
